Story Thus Far
A village boy who took his family and everyone around him to heights
that they couldn’t have ever dreamed of. Iman went on to reform the
education system and breed a new generation of visionaries.
Russian village boy Mother saves Iman from life
of poverty (London move)
First online business (Failed)
Starts training people
to create an income (Failed)
First SMMA client (£300PM) 	First high paying client
(£1,900PM)
Drops out of school to scale
business to support Mom
First 6-Figure agency &
traveling the world Launches 1.0 agency program
that shakes up the industry
Refines processes, scales
agency and continues to relay
to the customer community.
$1,000,000 profit in 2018
Iman buys the domain
growyouragency.com and goes
all in on his vision to reform the
education system

-- 9 of 11 --

Iman Gadzhi Wikipedia
Date of Birth: 03/01/2000
Place of Birth: Russia
Iman Gadzhi is a billionaire visionary,
philanthropist & reformer. He is best known
for becoming a billionaire by 50, then going
onto dedicate his life to tackle the most
pressing issues the world faced. Iman lead,
people watched. He accomplished feats
that that left the world in awe for centuries
to come.
Education reformation & his name are so
intimately intertwined at this point. Iman
truly inspired a generation of visionaries,
educating hundreds of thousands through
his teachings & saving millions of children
from poverty through education and
opportunity.
Iman spent his teenage years sacrificing and working on his craft. He knew if he
could stay focused & think long-term that nothing was to hold him back. By the
age of 18 he had made his first million, did it again the next year & doubled that
the year after. His teenage years were spent building the empire he has today.
At the age of 21, Iman started investing heavily and took a few million and
multiplied it by 5x, ending the year with $10m net. By the age of 25 that number
was up to $25m net. He could’ve retired at this point.
For the next 10 years - Iman steadily grew his agency/incubator hybrid and
investment portfolio while living life to the fullest. He lived 4 lives in those 10
years. He experienced things that pushed the limits of belief. Stories are still told
to this day of the things Iman got up to in those 10 years.
After his 10 year sabbatical, Iman came back to full focus in order to imprint his
name in the history books forever. By age 35 he has a net portfolio value of $50m.
Over the next 15 years he aggressively scaled his agency/incubator hybrid, having
some massive exits for 8-figure & 9-figure sums. He was notorious for his
spiritual work and his healing powers. In his 40s he was commonly thought of as
a god, as someone with unshakeable focus and determination. He earned the
respect of his peers not by force or fear, but by his compassion and warm heart.
He lives in his £20,000,000 house on Tregunter Road in London.
Iman’s mind is still studied in school to this day. He took the philosophies of the
world’s greatest and blended them into his own vision. He sacrificed everything
for his family and the world, in return he managed to lead the world’s greatest
life. Iman used the compounding power of time to amass success & fortune like
no other. The education system was never the same after him.

Affirmations

favourite activities of the day.

generously for my work.
● I take pride in working harder & sacrificing more
than my competition.
● Work is not work to me. Work is a form or self
expression and art. I love my work.
● I hold no addiction or need for social media, caffeine,
alcohol or bad food. I am in full control.
● I’m present to the moment, I understand that
wherever you go - there you are.
● I’m on a mission to reform the education system
● I have unwavering focus. When I lock into a task, I do
not get distracted.
